note: Shadow-fleet pattern zones — a focused Gulf overlay extending Watchstander's detection concepts (AIS gaps, spoofing, ship-to-ship transfers). Pattern-level areas from public reporting; deliberately NOT vessel-specific. Full MDA engine: watchstander.analyticadss.com.

properties.name: STS transfer zone — off Fujairah/Khor Fakkan
properties.detail: Long-standing dark-fleet STS area east of the strait: cargo swaps between sanctioned and clean tonnage, AIS often off or spoofed.
properties.source: Public reporting (UANI ghost-fleet tracking; Windward analyses)

properties.name: AIS-gap corridor — Iranian coastal waters
properties.detail: Sanctioned-oil movements hugging the Iranian coast routinely run dark between Kharg and the strait; spoofed positions cluster here.
properties.source: Public reporting (UANI; Lloyd's List Intelligence commentary)

properties.name: Kharg Island dark-loading zone
properties.detail: Export loadings with AIS disabled or spoofed to other positions; the origin of most dark-fleet voyages in the Gulf.
